ai_additions_and_assumptions.added_item: Four PostgreSQL schemas: raw_load, staging, dimensional, and reporting
ai_additions_and_assumptions.reason: Makes the required warehouse layers explicit and validation-ready.
Supports continuous calendar reporting and role-playing dates.
Implements dimensional joins independently of source identifiers.
Supports raw-to-staging lineage and load auditing.
Dimension history and tracked attribute changes were not specified.

ai_additions_and_assumptions.added_item: Degenerate order_id and order_item_id identifiers in facts
ai_additions_and_assumptions.reason: Preserves transaction traceability without unnecessary order dimensions.
Enables efficient brand and collection analysis.

ai_additions_and_assumptions.added_item: ETL validation for cross-table and aggregate business rules
ai_additions_and_assumptions.reason: PostgreSQL row-level CHECK constraints cannot validate other rows or tables.
Provides portable synthetic-data loading while retaining one authoritative transformation path.
